seoTitle: How to Export Data from ClickUp
metaDescription: Learn how to export your entire ClickUp workspace or a filtered list view to CSV or Excel for backups, analytics, or offline reporting.
intro: Whether you need a full workspace backup or just a filtered spreadsheet for an analytics report, ClickUp offers two different paths for exporting data. This guide covers triggering a global full-workspace export from Settings, as well as exporting a specific List or Table view with your current filters applied, and choosing between CSV and Excel formats.

steps.heading: Open the Import/Export settings
steps.body: Click your profile avatar to open Settings, then find the Import/Export node in the left management sidebar.

steps.heading: Start a full workspace export
steps.body: Locate the full workspace export module and click Start Export to begin compiling tasks, time logs, and custom fields into an archive.

steps.heading: Monitor progress
steps.body: Watch the system progress bar and check your administrative email inbox for the download link once the export finishes.

steps.heading: Export a specific view instead
steps.body: Navigate to a specific List or Table view, click the three-dot view settings toggle, and select Export from the dropdown.

steps.heading: Choose your file format
steps.body: Adjust your export filters to choose between standard CSV format or an Excel spreadsheet render.

steps.heading: Download the file
steps.body: Click Download File to instantly save the formatted spreadsheet to your local machine.

faq.question: What's the difference between a full export and a view export?
faq.answer: A full workspace export compiles everything into one archive, while a view export only includes the tasks currently visible in your filtered List or Table view.

faq.question: Can I hide sensitive columns from an exported file?
faq.answer: Yes, you can toggle custom columns to include or mask sensitive internal workspace data fields before exporting.

faq.question: Who can trigger a full workspace export?
faq.answer: Workspace role permissions determine who can access and initiate global spreadsheet downloads, which is often restricted to admins.

faq.question: What file formats does ClickUp support for exports?
faq.answer: ClickUp supports standard comma-separated value (CSV) and Excel spreadsheet formats for exported data.
